name: Corn Crisps
recipeInstructions:
PREPARATION: Melt the butter and lightly brush it over 2 sheets of parchment paper. Line 2 baking sheets with the paper, buttered side up. Set remaining butter aside. Adjust oven racks to middle position and heat oven to 425°F. Sift cornmeal with flour, salt, sugar, and baking powder into a large bowl. Beat egg lightly with milk and stir into dry ingredients until batter is lump-free. Stir in 2 1/2 tablespoons melted butter.
COOKING AND SERVING: Drop tablespoons of the batter onto the parchment paper, about 5 inches apart. With the back of a spoon, spread batter into 4-inch discs, leaving a 1-inch margin between them. Bake until browned, 10 to 12 minutes. Brush crisps with remaining butter and cool on wire rack. Store in an airtight container for up to 1 week. Makes 20 crisps.
